questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "formal"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "report"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "require"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "process"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "approve"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reject"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "announce"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "construct"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "establish"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "organize"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "conduct"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "examine"?
Choose the best word: The offer was _____ed.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The offer was rejected." — từ đúng là "reject" (từ chối).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The winner was _____d.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The winner was announced." — từ đúng là "announce" (thông báo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The road was _____ed last year.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The road was constructed last year." — từ đúng là "construct" (xây dựng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The company was _____ed in 2000.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The company was established in 2000." — từ đúng là "establish" (thành lập).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The event was _____d well.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The event was organized well." — từ đúng là "organize" (tổ chức).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The survey was _____ed online.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The survey was conducted online." — từ đúng là "conduct" (tiến hành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The patient was _____d by a doctor.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The patient was examined by a doctor." — từ đúng là "examine" (kiểm tra).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The software was _____ed yesterday.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The software was installed yesterday." — từ đúng là "install" (lắp đặt).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The building was _____ed.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The building was destroyed." — từ đúng là "destroy" (phá hủy).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Meals are _____d free.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Meals are provided free." — từ đúng là "provide" (cung cấp).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Tickets are _____d at the desk.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Tickets are issued at the desk." — từ đúng là "issue" (cấp/phát hành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She was _____ed a prize.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She was awarded a prize." — từ đúng là "award" (trao tặng).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The letter ___ written by Tom.
questions.explanation: Passive past simple: was + past participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Cars ___ produced in this factory.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple plural: are + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The bridge ___ built in 1990.
questions.explanation: Singular subject passive past: was + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: English ___ spoken all over the world.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple singular: is + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The room is ___ cleaned now.
questions.explanation: Present continuous passive: is being + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: These goods ___ made in Vietnam.
Complete the sentence: The book was ___ last year.
Complete the sentence: The car ___ being repaired.
questions.explanation: Singular present continuous passive: is being.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The results ___ announced tomorrow.
Complete the sentence: Penicillin ___ discovered by Fleming.
Which English word means "trang trọng"?
Which English word means "báo cáo"?
Which English word means "yêu cầu"?
Which English word means "xử lý/quá trình"?
questions.explanation: "xử lý/quá trình" trong tiếng Anh là "process".

questions.question: Which English word means "phê duyệt"?
Which English word means "từ chối"?
